entries.title: 2-tier verification architecture
entries.decision: Tier 1 (API verify, no clone) for bulk triage. Tier 2 (full clone + 5-agent) for high-star skills.

entries.title: Three-party verification separation
entries.decision: VM runs, SM reviews, PM approves. No single role can both execute and approve.

entries.title: Scoring formula fix priority
entries.decision: Formula 100 - min(40,penalty) - 15*b_missed makes large repos mathematically unable to pass. #1 pipeline fix needed.

entries.title: PM_VERIFIED_ORGS auto-clear
entries.decision: 48 trusted orgs auto-clear when injection count <= 3. Mitigates structural FPs from full-repo skills.

entries.title: SM self-evolve loop
entries.decision: SM learns from each verification run via sm_evolve.py. Updates structured memory with tag analysis, quality metrics, FP patterns.
